item.title: Tool installation framework
item.intent: clawhq tool install must add tools and trigger a Stage 2 rebuild automatically. Users must never hand-edit Dockerfiles to extend agent capabilities.
item.description: EXTENSIBILITY: Tool install framework is how users extend their agent's capabilities after initial setup. Without it, adding a new tool requires manual Dockerfile edits. Dockerfile patching + Stage 2 rebuild trigger means 'clawhq tool install' just works. Depends on CQ-003 (two-stage build) being complete. Acceptance: 'clawhq tool install <name>' adds tool to Dockerfile, triggers Stage 2 rebuild; 'clawhq tool list' shows installed tools; 'clawhq tool remove' cleanly uninstalls.
steps: Implement 'clawhq tool install <name>' with Dockerfile patching
Implement 'clawhq tool list' showing installed tools
Implement 'clawhq tool remove' for clean uninstall
Trigger Stage 2 rebuild automatically on tool changes
acceptanceCriteria: 'clawhq tool install <name>' adds tool to Dockerfile and triggers Stage 2 rebuild
'clawhq tool remove' cleanly uninstalls and triggers rebuild
